hero.tagline: Digital Manufacturing, Productivity & Production Monitoring Technologies

intro.title: 28 years of Digital Manufacturing Experience in Production
intro.body: trexDCAS connects shop-floor machines, operators, and production systems within a unified MES/MOM environment built for real-time manufacturing control. Its industrial IoT architecture, OEE monitoring, paperless workflows, traceability, ERP integration, anomaly detection, and advanced reporting turn fragmented production data into clear operational insight. Deployed across multiple industries and facilities, trexDCAS helps manufacturers identify hidden losses, improve capacity and operator efficiency, reduce scrap and downtime, and manage production with greater speed, visibility, and consistency.

cards.title: trexDCAS MES / MOM
cards.description: trexDCAS MES/MOM monitors production, measures OEE, tracks work orders, and reveals losses across machines, shifts, and lines.

cards.title: Industrial IoT Platform
cards.description: Alleantia Insights transforms machine data into dashboards, KPIs, anomaly alerts, and actionable performance insights for operational decisions.

cards.title: Integration Management System
cards.description: Integration Management System connects ERP and shop-floor systems, automating production orders, confirmations, and manufacturing-data exchange.

cards.title: Anomaly Assessment System
cards.description: Anomaly Assessment System detects abnormal trends in breakdowns, scrap, OEE, and operational KPIs, then alerts responsible teams.

cards.title: Maintenance Management System
cards.description: Maintenance Management System schedules asset maintenance, manages repair orders, tracks costs, and preserves technical instructions for authorized personnel.
